# BUG: when every spec in a grouped const block matches the regex, the
# block moves correctly but the trailing inline `// foo` comments are
# left behind in the source as orphan top-level comment lines that
# belong to nothing. The destination keeps the inline comments
# correctly; the source needs them deleted along with the spec.
#
# Hit while splitting internal/ast/ast.go: KindParam // … and ~10
# sibling consts moved cleanly into kind.go but ast.go was left with a
# floating block of // comments that gofmt then re-attached to a
# completely unrelated import line in a follow-up pass.
#
# Expected fix: when removing a spec from a grouped block, sflit must
# also remove its trailing line-comment along with the spec (the comment
# is part of the spec's CommentGroup in go/ast — extract it together).

exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Kind' -move
cmp big.go expected_big.go
cmp small.go expected_small.go

-- big.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA                   // doc-A inline
	KindB                   // doc-B inline
	KindC                   // doc-C inline
)
-- expected_big.go --
package p
-- expected_small.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA            // doc-A inline
	KindB            // doc-B inline
	KindC            // doc-C inline
)
